tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I said I wanna touch the earth.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna break it in my hands.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
I wanna grow something wild and unruly.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna sleep on the hard ground,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
In the comfort of your arms.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
On a pillow of bluebonnets in a blanket made of stars [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, it sounds good to me.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I said cowboy, take me away.[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Fly this girl as high as you can into the wild blue.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Set me free, oh, I pray.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Closer to heaven above and closer to you.[/tab]

Closer to you.


[Interlude]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 2]

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna walk and not run.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna skip and not fall.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I wanna look at the horizon and not see a building standing tall.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna be the only one for miles and miles.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Except for maybe you and your simple smile.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, it sounds good to me.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Yes, it sounds so good to me.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
